evidence_scope: controlled public Chrome iPhone USB active handover
primary_result: retry0 failed 3/3; retry1 succeeded 3/3 after one failed first attempt

application_recovery_evidence: Strong: explicit app retry converted repeated failure into success
paper_use: Strongest user-task continuity case; upload failure maps directly to task failure
